channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Scholar defends critical race theory
item.description: KimberlÃ© Williams Crenshaw, who helped coin the term, discusses her memoir and the concepts of intersectionality and critical race theory.

item.title: Iran conflict impacts jet fuel costs for air travelers
item.description: Rising fuel prices, airlines' second-largest expense, are linked to the U.S.-Iran conflict. Airlines are exploring strategies to manage costs.

item.title: Deployment strains military families
item.description: Families in Norfolk, Virginia, anticipate the return of approximately 15,000 sailors and Marines as the USS Ford concludes a deployment exceeding 10 months.

item.title: NPR's search for Polymarket headquarters reveals its elusive nature
item.description: U.S. regulators shut down the prediction market in 2022, and it has since reopened in Panama, gaining tax and legal advantages.
